abilities.name: 아로마베일
abilities.description: 같은 편으로 향하는 멘탈 공격을 막는다.

flavorTexts.text: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon’s body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.
The surface of this Pokémon’s skin hardens when exposed to intense heat, and its body has an appetizing aroma.
